requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Type Approval (ZICTA) and electrical conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容／无线型号核准（ZICTA）与电气合格评定
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容／無線型號核准（ZICTA）與電氣合格評定

summary.en: Zambia does NOT have an EU-style CE-marking / EMC Directive regime. For a plain wired lithium battery or power bank, EMC is handled through general ZABS product-conformity and import inspection against adopted IEC/ZS standards rather than a CE mark. However, where the power bank includes any wireless function (for example wireless charging, Bluetooth, or Wi-Fi), it requires type approval from the Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority (ZICTA) before importation, sale, or use. ZICTA type approval is typically supported by recognised test reports (for example to IEC/CISPR EMC and relevant radio standards). The Zambian electricity supply is 230 V, 50 Hz; the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase.
summary.zh: 赞比亚不设欧盟式CE标志／EMC指令体系。对于纯有线锂电池或移动电源，电磁兼容通过一般ZABS产品合格评定及依采纳IEC/ZS标准的进口检验处理，而非CE标志。但当移动电源含任何无线功能（例如无线充电、蓝牙或Wi-Fi）时，须在进口、销售或使用前取得赞比亚信息与通信技术管理局（ZICTA）的型号核准。ZICTA型号核准通常以受认可的测试报告支持（例如依IEC/CISPR电磁兼容及相关无线电标准）。赞比亚供电为230 V、50 Hz；50 Hz频率与中国一致，但标称电压与中国220 V单相／380 V三相不同。
summary.zht: 尚比亞不設歐盟式CE標誌／EMC指令體系。對於純有線鋰電池或行動電源，電磁兼容透過一般ZABS產品合格評定及依採納IEC/ZS標準的進口檢驗處理，而非CE標誌。但當行動電源含任何無線功能（例如無線充電、藍牙或Wi-Fi）時，須在進口、銷售或使用前取得尚比亞資訊與通訊技術管理局（ZICTA）的型號核准。ZICTA型號核准通常以受認可的測試報告支持（例如依IEC/CISPR電磁兼容及相關無線電標準）。尚比亞供電為230 V、50 Hz；50 Hz頻率與中國一致，但標稱電壓與中國220 V單相／380 V三相不同。

standards_or_laws: Information and Communication Technologies Act, 2009 — type approval administered by ZICTA
ZICTA type approval for radio/telecom equipment (where wireless function is present)
IEC/CISPR EMC standards adopted via ZS for general electrical conformity

summary.en: In China, EMC and radio aspects of power banks with wireless functions are handled via SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval and CCC for in-scope finished products, with GB/GB-T EMC standards (the GB 9254 / CISPR-derived family). A Chinese SRRC approval and CCC mark are recognised only domestically; they do not substitute for ZICTA type approval in Zambia. For a wired-only power bank, China relies on GB 31241 safety plus applicable GB-T EMC standards.
summary.zh: 在中国，含无线功能移动电源的电磁兼容及无线电方面通过SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准及对适用成品的CCC处理，并采用GB/GB-T电磁兼容标准（GB 9254／源自CISPR系列）。中国SRRC核准及CCC标志仅在国内受认可，不能替代赞比亚ZICTA型号核准。对于纯有线移动电源，中国依靠GB 31241安全标准加适用GB-T电磁兼容标准。
summary.zht: 在中國，含無線功能行動電源的電磁兼容及無線電方面透過SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准及對適用成品的CCC處理，並採用GB/GB-T電磁兼容標準（GB 9254／源自CISPR系列）。中國SRRC核准及CCC標誌僅在國內受認可，不能替代尚比亞ZICTA型號核准。對於純有線行動電源，中國依靠GB 31241安全標準加適用GB-T電磁兼容標準。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 / GB-T EMC standards (CISPR-derived) — China domestic EMC requirements
SRRC type approval — China radio approval where wireless function is present
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — where the finished product is in scope

gap.en: There is no CE mark and no EU-style EMC Directive in Zambia, so the gap is different from the EU lane. Key gaps: (1) any wireless function (wireless charging, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi) triggers ZICTA type approval before import/sale — a Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer; (2) EMC for wired products is checked through ZABS/ZS conformity rather than a self-declared CE mark; (3) voltage difference (Zambia 230 V vs China 220/380 V) affects any mains charger packaged with the power bank, which should be rated for 230 V, 50 Hz and fitted with a Zambia-compatible plug (Type C / D / G are commonly encountered). Confirm the current ZICTA approved-equipment requirements and accepted test-report formats.
gap.zh: 赞比亚没有CE标志，也没有欧盟式EMC指令，因此差距与欧盟通道不同。主要差距：（1）任何无线功能（无线充电、蓝牙、Wi-Fi）在进口／销售前触发ZICTA型号核准——中国SRRC核准不可转用；（2）有线产品的电磁兼容通过ZABS/ZS合格评定核查，而非自我声明的CE标志；（3）电压差异（赞比亚230 V对中国220/380 V）影响随附的任何市电充电器，其应按230 V、50 Hz额定并配赞比亚兼容插头（常见Type C／D／G）。请确认当前ZICTA核准设备要求及接受的测试报告格式。
gap.zht: 尚比亞沒有CE標誌，也沒有歐盟式EMC指令，因此差距與歐盟通道不同。主要差距：（1）任何無線功能（無線充電、藍牙、Wi-Fi）在進口／銷售前觸發ZICTA型號核准——中國SRRC核准不可轉用；（2）有線產品的電磁兼容透過ZABS/ZS合格評定核查，而非自我聲明的CE標誌；（3）電壓差異（尚比亞230 V對中國220/380 V）影響隨附的任何市電充電器，其應按230 V、50 Hz額定並配尚比亞兼容插頭（常見Type C／D／G）。請確認當前ZICTA核准設備要求及接受的測試報告格式。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where wireless function is present — ZICTA type approval required before import/sale/use; for wired products EMC is assessed via ZABS/ZS import conformity. No CE mark or EU EMC Directive applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — SRRC type approval and CCC where in scope; GB/GB-T EMC standards for domestic conformity

source.publisher: Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority (ZICTA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zambia has no CE mark or EU-style EMC Directive. Wired power banks are assessed for EMC through ZABS/ZS import conformity, while any wireless function (wireless charging, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi) requires ZICTA type approval before import or sale — Chinese SRRC/CCC approvals do not transfer. A bundled mains charger should be rated 230 V, 50 Hz with a Zambia-compatible plug. Confirm current ZICTA requirements and accepted test-report formats.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 赞比亚没有CE标志或欧盟式EMC指令。有线移动电源通过ZABS/ZS进口合格评定核查电磁兼容，而任何无线功能（无线充电、蓝牙、Wi-Fi）在进口或销售前须取得ZICTA型号核准——中国SRRC/CCC核准不可转用。随附的市电充电器应按230 V、50 Hz额定并配赞比亚兼容插头。请确认当前ZICTA要求及接受的测试报告格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚比亞沒有CE標誌或歐盟式EMC指令。有線行動電源透過ZABS/ZS進口合格評定核查電磁兼容，而任何無線功能（無線充電、藍牙、Wi-Fi）在進口或銷售前須取得ZICTA型號核准——中國SRRC/CCC核准不可轉用。隨附的市電充電器應按230 V、50 Hz額定並配尚比亞兼容插頭。請確認當前ZICTA要求及接受的測試報告格式。
